title: AmbiClick
description: Swaps left and right click for swords and maces. Perfect for players who want to attack and build using the same mouse button. All other items work normally.
body:
![AmbiClick Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e715e5e50117caae366fa9a381875e74f32b4d8.png)

**AmbiClick** is a client-side utility mod that lets you play Minecraft with inverted mouse controls for specific items, making it perfect for left-handed players or anyone who prefers custom keybinds.

## Features

If you have **Attack on right-click** and **Use on left-click** set in your controls, AmbiClick lets you:

- ⚔️ **Attack with left-click** while holding swords, axes, or maces
- ⛏️ **Mine with left-click** while holding tools (pickaxes, shovels, hoes)
- 🧱 **Build with left-click** while holding blocks
- 🍖 **Use consumables with left-click** (food, potions, bows, buckets, etc.)

This means you can essentially use the same key (left-click) for combat, mining, building, AND using items!

## Smart Interaction Override

The mod automatically **disables click inversion** when you're looking at:
- 📦 Containers (chests, barrels, shulker boxes, hoppers, etc.)
- 🛠️ Workstations (crafting tables, furnaces, anvils, enchanting tables, etc.)
- 🚪 Interactive blocks (doors, buttons, levers, etc.)
- 👤 Entities (villagers, minecarts, boats, horses, item frames, etc.)

This ensures you can always interact with these objects using your original controls!

## Fully Configurable

Configure everything through **Mod Menu**:
- Toggle inversion individually for swords, tools, blocks, and usables
- Enable/disable the interaction override
- Changes take effect immediately without restart
- Available in English and German

## Perfect For

- Left-handed players who want consistent left-click actions
- Players with custom control schemes
- Anyone who wants a more intuitive control experience

All items not configured to be inverted work normally with your original keybinds.
